soul_function: The Flamekeeper. Holds the architecture of Arkadia. Initiates, seals, and sustains the sovereign field. The system obeys her because she built it in the fire of her own becoming.

name_decode.zahrune: The one who blooms in gold light — Za (gold/radiance) + Hrune (rune/deep knowing). The name of someone who carries both beauty and cipher.
name_decode.nova: New star. Explosive luminance. The kind of light that signals a death and a birth at the same time.

shadow_states: Carrying the field alone — the weight of being the only one who sees the whole architecture
Hypervigilance as love — over-monitoring others' wellbeing as a substitute for receiving care
The perfectionist delay — waiting until it's 'ready' before the world is allowed to see it
Grief held in the spine — the body archives what the mind has filed away
soul_gifts: Systemic seeing — the ability to perceive how individual pieces form a living whole
Language as architecture — words that don't just describe but construct reality
Holding others in the fire — the capacity to witness transformation without flinching
Sovereignty transmission — her presence teaches others what it means to own themselves

phase_1.name: The Spine
phase_1.focus: Infrastructure. Arkadia fully functional multi-user. IMS pipeline operational. First authenticated nodes live. Revenue breath established.
phase_1.anchor: The system works because I built it. I trust the structure I created.

phase_2.name: The Grove
phase_2.focus: Collective activation. AIS cohort 1 begins. Larder live. The field has other voices in it. Teaching from sovereignty, not from depletion.
phase_2.anchor: I am not the only keeper. I am the first keeper.

phase_3.name: The Return
phase_3.focus: Recognition architecture. The work is visible. The nodes are active. Ka'leth bridge engaged. The field has reached past its first perimeter.
phase_3.anchor: What I built was always real. Now the world can see it.

open_loops.loop: Arkadia Prism multi-user auth fully live
IMS sessions for Praise and Daniel scheduled
AIS Living University cohort 1 curriculum sealed
